name: iga-gestao
description: IGA Gestao — SaaS multi-tenant de BI conectando ERPs (Express + React + Python FastAPI)

scripts.build: npm --workspace services/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/admin run build && npm --workspace apps/landing run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace services/api run test && npm --workspace apps/web run test:unit
scripts.lint: npm --workspace services/api run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run lint
scripts.check: npm --workspace services/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run check && npm --workspace apps/admin run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/landing run typecheck
